raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wahrdu pasiht/ ko tas KUNGS
ne irr runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tas Praweets eekſch
ta KUNGA Wahrdã runnahs/
un tas Wahrdã ne noteek / un
tas arrt ne nahk/ jchis irr tas
Wahrdã/ ko tas KUNGS ne
irr runnajs/ tas Praweets irr to
applam runnajs/ tapehz ne bih-
stees preeſch winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tã kad kas ar fawn Tu-
wakũ Meschã eetu Malku zirſt /
un wiꞥſch fawu Rohku ar Zirivi
pazeltu Malku zirſt/ un ta Dſel-
ſe nonuktu no ta Kahta/ un ais-
xentu winna Tuwakũ/ ka tas
mirtu/ tas laid eekſch weena no
ſcheem Pilſfahtcem behg / un
dſihwe paleek.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tas Afimu-Atreebejs
tam Nokaweiam ne dſihtohs pak-
kat/ kad winna Sirõs irr ſakar-
fusi / un tas panahktu winnu /
kad tas Zetſch tahtu buhtu / un
xentu winnam to Dſihwibũ /
jepſchu ne kahda Nahives Teefa
pahr winnu gahjuſi/ jo wiꞥſch ne
bij to pirnak eenihdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz pawehſtu es tew /
un ſakku: Tew buhs ſew trihs
Pilſfahtus atſchkirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas KUNGS taws
Deews tawu Rohbeschũ isplat-
tihs / ittin ka wiꞥſch taweem
Tehweem ſwehrejs irr/ un dohs
tew winnu Semmi/ ko wiꞥſch
runnajs irr taweem Tehweem
doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu winnu scho Bauſn
turreſi/ to darriht/ ko es tew ſcho-
deën pawehſtu/ ka tu to KUNGU
tawu Deewu mihto / un winnu
Muhschu winna Zetſch statga /
tad buhs tew preeſch fewim weh-
trihs Pilſfahtus pee ſcheem trim-
peelikt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka nenoseedsigs Afimu-
tohp iſleets tawas Seines Wid-
dũ / ko tas KUNGS taw-
Deews tew par Jhpaschumu-
doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIX. Nodalla.
No teem 6 Waffas. Pilſfahteem preeſch teem/
fas netihschu ohtru nokauj : 1 / 5 / 9. Ka
buhs to tiſchu Slepkawibu ſohdiht: 11.
Rohbeschũ Akmiaus ne buhs ismaitaht: 14.
No keezineekẽin: 15. Un ka buhs wiltigus
keezineelus ſohdiht: 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad tas KUNGS taws
Deews tohs Pagarus
Wisdeldehs/ kurru Semmi
tas KUNGS taws Deews tew
dohs/ un tu tohs eemantofi / un
winnu Pilſfahtõs / un winnu
Nammdõs dſihwoſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew trihs Pilſ-
fahtus atſchkirt tawas Semmes
Widdu/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deews tew dohs winnu eeman-
toht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taſt to Zetſu us turren /
un to Rohbeschũ tawas Sem-
mes/ ko tas KUNGS taws
Deews liks eemantoht / trejas
Daltãs buhs tew to ſchkirt/ ka
us turren behgt warr / ifkatrs/
fas kahdn nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to buhs darriht tam /
Gr: fas weenu nokawis/ kam ustur-
ren irr jabehq/ ka tas dſihwo/ fas
fawu Tuwakũ netihschi noſittie
irr/ ko wiꞥſch pirnak ne eenihdeja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
